title: Folinstall Wide Mouth Apothecary Jar with Lid, 0.5 Gallon Glass Jar for Kitchen Storage and Laundry Room Organization, 72 oz Clear Glass Container for Cookie, Candy, Sugar, Flour, Nuts
description:
About this item
Healthy and No Smell - Glass is a healthier choice over plastic storage. Glass does not discolor, retain smells, or leach chemicals into food
Sturdy and Easy to Clean - This candy jar increases thickness for added durability and stability. What’s more, you can wash this cookie jar with warm water, and wipe them with a damp cloth
Clear Glass Jar - Wide mouth glass canister allows the contents of the jar to be easily seen without removing the lid
Wide Mouth Design - The canning jar features a large mouth (4.7 inches) that makes filling and storing preserves with ease, so you don’t have to worry about spilling sauces or pickled vegetables
Decorate Your Kitchen - This apothecary jar with lid has a contemporary design with a beautiful display, it stores conveniently and looks great on any counter, party, bathroom vanity, dresser, or buffet table, a beautiful complement to most kitchen decorating
Multi-Function Food Storage Jar - 0.56 gallon(2300ML) halloween candy jar is great for many uses. Can be used for canning or pickling. Also suited for dry goods such as cereal, candy, legumes, pasta, and much more. Not only does it allow you to store different amounts of food, but it looks visually appealing when displayed on a counter or shelf
› See more product details
reviews_5s: Glass,can see contents, pull top needed because of the nice seal, good size and looks nice next to the bean grinderI bought this for the winter season to put Gingersnap cookies in. It’s the perfect size and looks very seasonal with the dark brown Gingersnaps cookies, and they stay nice and fresh.Airtight and so cute with label we madeBought for a game. Very impressed with the quality.Super sturdy jar with a tight lid. I turned mine into a little terrarium!Great for flour.I love this jar! The perfect size for my biscottis.perfect size and very tight seal to keep things fresh.Item as described. Appreciate packaging for this fragile item.perfect for storing flowers or plats you want to preserve.
reviews_1s: I bought 2 of these jars from “second chance” sellers, meaning the jars were returned from someone else. I read the reviews… I wanted to give them a home! The glass is great! They’re functional and large. They have a wide mouth so it’s easy to put treats in. The seal on the lid is terrible. It falls out constantly or won’t pull out of the jar for ease of use age. Overall, unfortunately, these jars are just plain awful.Not sure about material choice for the seal. It will not hold up. I do not know what the 2 hole punches are for, but the mess up the aesthetic of the jar lid. It appears uneven and incorrect. See photos.Very misleading. This is very cheaply made the plastic”secure” piece does not even fot right. Lid n plastic piece are separate . Does not seal at all. This is terrible. Sorry to say it but I will not recommend this at all. I wasted my money. I can’t use it. Maybe for a planter without lid?So disappointing. These glass canisters have a very visible seam that cuts down the middle "and" and silicone gasket is very thin, rippled and difficult to secure onto the top of the canister itself...no bueno!I bought this jar to use as a candy jar. I have had it for about 6 months. It gets opened a few times a week. It stays in the same spot - doesn’t get handled often. A few months ago. We noticed that it had developed a vertical crack on one side. Today, my husband picked it up to move it closer to him so he could take the lid off and the whole jar separated completely from the base, spilling the candy everywhere.Okay I’m sure this is a great product and it looks really nice, and I originally purchased it to store 5lbs of coffee beans because they would look so nice on the shelf with this jar. However when I opened the lid, there was a really horrible smell, and even worse there was a hair not on, but INSIDE of the lid seal. The lid seal appeared to be kind of warped and bent backwards, wavy as if it had been used before. It did stick quite well, more credit that this would have been awesome to have. I attached pictures of the hair (man i even feel like the “theres a hair in my food” lady just writing this lol). I don’t want to be THAT person, but accompanied with the smell im not gonna use this and will likely return it :(The seal is cheap, hard plastic and keeps curling backwards! I do NOT recommend this.This cannister was purchased for flour storage. The mouth of the cannister is slightly too small for removing flour. The seal on the lid is very cheap plastic and its durability is doubtful. The cannister is a little too small to comfortably hold a 5 pound bag of flour. All in all, everything about this cannister'cuts corners' so that while it may 'tecnically' have certain features, the viability of those features is questionable.The glass was cheap and cloudy. Visible seams down the sides. Sending it back. Very cheapWanted to love it, but box had been open. I received broken glass. Now I have to ship back broken glass.
